description: NC-loss intervention on frozen Pythia backbone, DBpedia K=14, non-crowded regime

arms.nc_full: CE + NC-loss (L_within + L_ETF + L_margin), differentiable class means
arms.nc_within_only: CE + L_within only (within-class collapse only, no ETF)
arms.shuffled_nc: CE + NC-loss with shuffled class labels (control)

predictions.anti_control: nc_full direction is bidirectional (q and kappa move together)

key_fixes_vs_previous: q and kappa measured in SAME space as NC-loss optimization (proj_head outputs)
class_means computed differentiably (no detach/no_grad for ETF computation)
Non-crowded regime: DBpedia K=14, not CIFAR-100 K=20
Full-batch training (7000 samples) for stable class mean estimates
note: Pre-registered BEFORE data loading or model initialization
